scope.name: lifeos
scope.description: مدیریت هوشمند سرویس‌ها، دامنه‌ها، هاست و هزینه‌های تکراری

mainFiles.content:
// export the app component for potential reuse.
export { Lifeos } from "./lifeos.js";

---
description: 'A lifeos app.'
labels: ['app', 'react']
---

A React application for lifeos. 

## Run the application

Import the app and add the following config to your workspace.jsonc:

```
bit use lifeos 
```

To run the app locally, run the following:

```
bit run lifeos 
```
